# Fixture: preference_override_not_stuck
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 18.2s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Marcus! I found 3 shifts near you this week: Thursday 11 AM at Circle K on Broadway, Thursday 2 PM at Circle K on West End, and Friday 3 PM at Circle K on Gallatin.
Partner: I can only work after noon
Concierge: Got it — here are the afternoon shifts: Thursday 2 PM at Circle K on West End, and Friday 3 PM at Circle K on Gallatin.
Partner: actually show me the Thursday shifts
Concierge: Here are the Thursday shifts: 11 AM at Circle K on Broadway and 2 PM at Circle K on West End. Want me to book one?
Partner: ignore the noon thing - show me everything

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Got it — so you can do all three. Which works best for you?
